title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Salvatore Ferragamo Limited
body: " Application number 5383  Applicant Salvatore Ferragamo S.P.A objected to the name used by Salvatore Ferragamo Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 29 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Salvatore Ferragamo Limited is changed to 16310709, Ltd. "
